query:
SELECT
  SUM(CASE WHEN title LIKE '%vitest%' OR title LIKE '%probe%' OR contentText LIKE '%vitest%' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS suspicious,
  SUM(CASE WHEN adultNotes LIKE '%archived%' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS archived,
  COUNT(*) AS total,
  MIN(submittedAt) AS earliest,
  MAX(submittedAt) AS latest
FROM assignmentSubmissions;

  SUM(CASE WHEN adultNotes LIKE '%archived%' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS archived,
  COUNT(*) AS total,
  MIN(submittedAt) AS earliest,
  MAX(submittedAt) AS latest
FROM assignmentSubmissions;
